implemented_evidence: fibrodynmix_nb_loglik(), fibrodynmix_nb_objective(), fit_fibrodynmix_nb()
claim_boundary: Current optimizer is a pragmatic NB implementation, not full joint Bayesian inference.
target_relevance: Core distinction from gene-set scoring for iScience/Communications Biology.

implemented_evidence: fit_fibrodynmix_initializer(), fit_fibrodynmix_nb(), fit_fibrodynmix_vi()
claim_boundary: Latent z is inferred, but full amortized inference remains future work.
target_relevance: Supports mixed-state plasticity claim.

implemented_evidence: fit_fibrodynmix_nb(study_id, donor_id), study/donor effect diagnostics
claim_boundary: Ridge hierarchy effects are implemented; full posterior over effects remains future work.
target_relevance: Addresses cross-cohort confounding reviewers will expect.

implemented_evidence: bootstrap_fibrodynmix(), fit_fibrodynmix_vi(), posterior interval summaries
claim_boundary: Bootstrap and lightweight VI posterior are implemented; full all-parameter posterior remains future work.
target_relevance: Supports uncertainty reporting required for mature probabilistic methods.

implemented_evidence: evaluate_posterior_intervals(), calibrate_posterior_interval_scale(), analysis/vi_benchmark
claim_boundary: Calibration uses simulated truth and should not be presented as real-data calibration.
target_relevance: Quantifies posterior calibration rather than asserting uncertainty qualitatively.

implemented_evidence: fit_topic_nmf_baseline(), run_extended_method_benchmark.R, marker scoring, NMF/topic baseline, FibroDynMix NB/VI comparisons
claim_boundary: Simulation method comparison; marker scoring remains competitive in marker-aligned low-noise settings and should not be dismissed.
target_relevance: Adds a mature-package NMF/topic comparator and clarifies what FibroDynMix improves beyond ordinary topic models.

implemented_evidence: select_fibrodynmix_nb_model(), run_validation_aware_nb_selection.R, held-out likelihood, z stability, marker-gradient preservation, and downstream validation
claim_boundary: Selector is simulation-calibrated; truth metrics are audit columns only and final real-data reruns still need selected defaults.
target_relevance: Addresses objective-only NB stopping as a reviewer risk and gives a defensible default-selection rule.

implemented_evidence: run_core_converged_method_benchmark.R with include_scvi, project-local scvi-tools/anndata/torch environment, and scVI latent projection baseline
claim_boundary: scVI is included as a bounded latent baseline; it is not a full scANVI or cNMF replacement and should not be overinterpreted from small simulated runs.
target_relevance: Closes the deep generative baseline gap for the core simulation benchmark.

implemented_evidence: run_marker_stress_benchmark.R corrupted, missing, shared, swapped, and hidden-program marker-prior stress modes
claim_boundary: Stress benchmark supports bounded failure-mode claims, not universal dominance over marker scoring.
target_relevance: Clarifies when marker scoring fails and when FibroDynMix provides competitive or improved recovery plus richer model outputs.

implemented_evidence: compute_state_cost(), estimate_transition_flow(), compute_fpi(), Figure 6
claim_boundary: Flow is cross-sectional optimal transport, not lineage tracing.
target_relevance: Connects state mixtures to fibroblast plasticity hypothesis.

implemented_evidence: fit_fibrodynmix_transfer(), run_cross_cohort_transfer_benchmark(), public real-data transfer smoke
claim_boundary: Transfer mechanics are implemented; completed human cross-atlas generalization remains future work.
target_relevance: Supports cross-dataset migration claim with bounded evidence.

implemented_evidence: run_multi_public_realdata_validation.R pooled public fit, study-effect adjustment, transition flow, and leave-dataset-out transfer
claim_boundary: Default registry uses two public condition-specific count matrices from one Dryad record; a completed human disease-atlas claim remains future work.
target_relevance: Moves the real-data layer beyond one pooled smoke run and gives reviewers explicit leave-dataset-out diagnostics.

implemented_evidence: prepare_gse246215_fibroblast_inputs.R plus run_multi_public_realdata_validation.R on GSE246215 human fibroblast count matrices
claim_boundary: GSE246215 uses public processed count matrices and sampled cancer-type subsets; raw FASTQ-level reprocessing and definitive cancer biology claims remain future work.
target_relevance: Adds an independent human multi-patient fibroblast atlas source beyond the mouse Dryad validation.

implemented_evidence: prepare_gse167339_human_fibroblast_inputs.R plus run_multi_public_realdata_validation.R on GSE167339 human fibroblast MTX samples
claim_boundary: GSE167339 uses bounded sampled 10x-style processed MTX matrices from three donors; Human 3 hash groups are included as hash_unknown without treatment-label interpretation.
target_relevance: Adds an independent human donor-level perturbation dataset beyond the cancer atlas validation.

implemented_evidence: run_gse167339_donor_robustness.R donor composition, leave-donor-out transfer, and hash-threshold sensitivity
claim_boundary: GSE167339 donor robustness supports transfer and threshold stability, not Human3 treatment-specific biology.
target_relevance: Converts the GSE167339 real-data layer into explicit donor-level reproducibility evidence.

implemented_evidence: audit_independent_fibroblast_datasets.R ranks GSE167339, GSE156326, GSE181316, GSE246215, scar sensitivity datasets, and bulk endpoint support
claim_boundary: Readiness audit does not rerun heavy fitting and does not convert scar-project outputs into FibroDynMix claims without figure/source-data integration.
target_relevance: Identifies the external-data path for a method-first submission with bounded biological-utility evidence.

implemented_evidence: make_figure5.R integrates GSE167339 donor/transfer evidence with GSE156326/GSE181316 scar state composition and module validation
claim_boundary: External Figure 5 supports reproducibility and biological utility; GSE156326/GSE181316 module contrasts are descriptive small-sample effects and do not pass FDR significance.
target_relevance: Promotes independent public human fibroblast data into a main-figure-level biological validation panel.

implemented_evidence: run_selected_nb_final_summaries.R reruns VI, transfer, and GSE246215 downstream summaries using validation-aware selected NB defaults
claim_boundary: Selected-NB final summaries are simulation-calibrated and preserve baseline-competitive language for GSE246215.
target_relevance: Anchors final summary claims to explicit model-selection defaults instead of fixed smoke settings.

implemented_evidence: run_bioinformatics_validation.R fibroblast purity QC, state-associated genes/pathways, donor-aware abundance, and FPI
claim_boundary: Bioinformatics validation uses curated marker/pathway checks and donor summaries, not exhaustive annotation or causal biology.
target_relevance: Shows input fibroblast purity, biological interpretability of state programs, and donor-aware state/FPI shifts.

implemented_evidence: run_gse246215_sensitivity.R random downsampling, library-size q95 trimming, transfer convergence, and composition variability
claim_boundary: QC sensitivity supports computational robustness but HCC remains a library-size outlier and should not be overinterpreted biologically.
target_relevance: Addresses real-data robustness and library-size confounding concerns without relying on new figures.

implemented_evidence: run_public_realdata_smoke.R, run_public_realdata_transfer.R, Figure 2, public smoke figure
claim_boundary: Public analyses are technical smoke tests, not disease-mechanism claims.
target_relevance: Shows raw-count execution outside simulation.

implemented_evidence: run_reproducibility_audit.R analysis catalog, script inventory, documentation inventory, and runbook
claim_boundary: Audit checks file presence and metadata coverage; it does not rerun every heavy analysis.
target_relevance: Supports reproducible research handoff and manuscript evidence traceability.

implemented_evidence: run_runtime_lock.R package dependency lock, R session info, external data lock, and heavy-analysis I/O contract
claim_boundary: Runtime lock is a package-level snapshot and analysis contract, not a full renv.lock or container image.
target_relevance: Supports dependency/runtime review and public-data handoff for a mature R package.

implemented_evidence: NEWS.md, inst/CITATION, cran-comments.md, _pkgdown.yml, function index, R CMD check OK
claim_boundary: Package is development version 0.0.0.9000, not yet submitted to CRAN/Bioconductor.
target_relevance: Supports mature R package review and reproducibility expectations.

implemented_evidence: figures/figure1-6, public_realdata_smoke, panel source-data manifests, export QC
claim_boundary: Figures are manuscript-facing computational outputs; external biological panels remain bounded public count-matrix validations, not standalone disease-atlas proof.
target_relevance: Supports source-backed figure review.
